title: Let's Try This Again - The King's Epic Boss Intro Test
description:
This one's rendered with the bitrate setting I've been saving up for a while, so unlike the last one, the picture quality DOESN'T SUCK this time. Lemme show you the last one for comparison's sake https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W1kbQwwCwFY
After a week of wasted opportunities, one night of work, and a small window of free time amist overtime at work, here's a testrun of a new boss intro screen template I whipped up, using Pete as an example.
This will be used for future King's Epic Adventure episodes. Credit would go to FamilyJules7X for the Stage Start remix, (it was the opening for his MMX Medley,) and Chaofanatic for not only making the hugeass flare background, but the Virus Logo model too.
